content.full_text:
Mrs. T. Huebner  
1708 Davis Drive  
Burlingame, CA 94010

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-02-178

Dear Mrs. Huebner:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ Under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, unless you are an authorized representative of Donald Newman, M.D., for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. However, if you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you have the option of filing a complaint with our Enforcement Division. I have enclosed a fact sheet explaining the complaint process procedure.

Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Joan Giannetta  
Legal Secretary

Enclosures

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
